summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Prop Forge plan gating system. Backend APIs working correctly, authentication functional, basic UI working. Found issues with PaywallGate component integration and upgrade modal functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: PaywallGate components not found with data-testid='paywall-gate'
Upgrade modal not triggering when clicking locked firms/PRO badges

integration_issues.issue: PaywallGate components not properly connected to UI elements
Bootstrap mode gating not clearly visible or implemented

passed_tests: Backend /api/user/plan endpoint returns correct plan for authenticated user
Free user sees FREE badge in header
Language toggle (i18n) works for ES/EN switching
Core app functionality: select firm, navigate tabs
Free user can access allowed firms (apex_eod, topstep, ftmo)
PRO badges visible on locked firms
Gated sections visible in Gloss tab (commissions, behavioral, post-pass)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix PaywallGate component integration - ensure data-testid='paywall-gate' is properly added to gated UI elements and upgrade modal triggers are connected. Verify bootstrap mode gating is properly implemented with PaywallGate wrapper.
